summary: Comprehensive testing of ALL modules in Finanzas 4.0 Peruvian Finance App. 38/38 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages load correctly including the previously problematic Asientos page which is now working without 'Cargando' stuck state. All 29+ sidebar navigation items tested successfully.

backend_api_modules.Dashboard KPIs: PASS - Returns KPI data for empresa_id=6
backend_api_modules.Kardex Cuenta: PASS - Returns account kardex with movimientos

frontend_pages.Letras: PASS - Empty state with 'Generar Letras' button
frontend_pages.Generar Planilla: PASS - Page loads with summary cards
frontend_pages.Asientos (CRITICAL): PASS - NO 'Cargando' stuck state, data table displays correctly with journal entries
frontend_pages.Flujo de Caja: PASS - Report page loads with date filters

critical_code_review_comments: The Asientos page previously reported as stuck in 'Cargando' state is now fully functional with data displaying correctly
All sidebar sections (PRINCIPAL, VENTAS, PROVEEDORES Y EGRESOS, BANCOS Y PAGOS, PLANILLA, PRESUPUESTOS, CATALOGOS, CONTABILIDAD, REPORTES) work correctly
Note: Route paths are at root level (e.g., /asientos not /contabilidad/asientos) - sidebar navigation uses correct routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive testing completed for ALL modules. Key findings: 1) All 38 backend API endpoints return 200 status with valid data. 2) All frontend pages load without errors. 3) Asientos page (previously flagged as problematic) is now working correctly - no 'Cargando' stuck state. 4) Frontend routes are at root level (e.g., /asientos, /categorias) not nested under sections. 5) App uses empresa_id=6 (Ambission Industries SAC) as the default company with data. 6) Ventas POS has 4748 records available. 7) All sidebar navigation works correctly.
